perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a blue patterned dress and a transparent plastic overlay stands in a brightly lit food booth with 'haha baby' branding. (2) She points to shelves stacked with colorful food boxes including curry and noodle packs. (3) The camera shows close-up shots of bowls containing beef noodles and lamb soup, then pans across snacks like rice crackers and jelly cups. (4) The woman gestures toward a menu board and someone is shown pouring batter into an egg cake mold shaped like a character. (5) Final shots show more product boxes and customers in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. (2) A female voice speaks enthusiastically, introducing the 'food zone' and mentioning Chinese New Year preparations. (3) As the visuals change, she describes specific items like curry rice, beef noodles, and new snack products. (4) Background ambient noise includes faint chatter and sounds of a busy retail environment. (5) The narration continues with a focus on trying individual items before buying full boxes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative text '提供試吃' (Samples provided) appears with a flower icon. (3) 'haha baby' brand name is visible on most product packaging. (4) A 'MENU' board lists food items like curry rice and egg cakes with prices in NTD.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Showcase -> Prepared Food Highlight -> Sales Pitch

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female presenter, 2 staff members behind the counter, and 3 background customers/passers-by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a blue and white camouflage-patterned dress and a clear, thin plastic outerwear.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A retail booth filled with high shelves of colorful, boxed food products and snacks. The booth features bright signage and warm lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Feature -> Experience -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional vlog designed to introduce consumers to the 'haha baby' food brand's physical store setup, highlighting variety and convenience of the products for the upcoming Chinese New Year. It emphasizes the quality of instant meals and the option to sample foods on-site.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presenter is actively showing and describing specific brand products within a branded store environment.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct engagement with viewers, quick product-to-camera panning.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the standard format of Taiwanese retail influencer content, using high energy and fast edits to maintain viewer interest during a product tour.
